# CWE-359 vulnerable — Exposure of Private Personal Information
lang: go
file: CWE-359-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Writer http.ResponseWriter
	Request *http.Request
}

type UserPII struct {
	Email string `json:"email"`
	SSN   string `json:"ssn"`
	Phone string `json:"phone"`
}

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) Get(dest interface{}, query string, args ...interface{}) error {
	*(dest.(*UserPII)) = UserPII{Email: "a@b.c", SSN: "123-45-6789", Phone: "555-0100"}
	return nil
}

func FetchProfile(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	var row UserPII
	_ = db.Get(&row, "SELECT email, ssn, phone FROM users WHERE id = ?", c.Request.URL.Query().Get("id"))
	out, _ := json.Marshal(row)
	_, _ = c.Writer.Write(out)
	return nil
}
